title: evolvulus lithospermoides
intro: Evolvulus lithospermoides, also known as Dwarf Blue-dusk Mornay, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It is a shrub-like perennial herb with blue flowers that are rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, due to its antipyretic, analgesic, and antiseptic properties. Evolvulus lithospermoides can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and promoting overall well-being.
